title: Agent Routing Rules Schema
description: Defines default agent ownership per stream and path-based routing overrides. Consumed by .agents/routing.yml.

defaults.description: Default owner agent ID per stream. Applied when a task has no explicit owner and no path rule matches.

paths.description: Ordered path-based routing rules. First match wins.

match.description: Glob pattern relative to repo root (e.g. 'apps/web/**').

owner.description: Agent ID that owns changes to paths matching this rule.

reviewers.description: Agent IDs that must review changes to paths matching this rule.

notes.description: Optional human-readable rationale for this rule.
